code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a written work into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper to produce a clause for each predicate
    def clause(triple: Triple) -> str:
        s, p, o = triple.subject, triple.predicate, triple.object
        # Basic patterns for common predicates
        patterns = {
            "author": f"{s} was written by {o}",
            "isbnNumber": f"The ISBN of {s} is {o}",
            "followedBy": f"{s} is followed by {o}",
            "precededBy": f"{s} was preceded by {o}",
            "language": f"{s} is written in {o}",
            "mediaType": f"{s} is available in {o}",
            "numberOfPages": f"{s} contains {o} pages",
            "country": f"{s} was published in {o}",
            "almaMater": f"The author of {s} studied at {o}",
            "doctoralAdvisor": f"The author of {s} was advised by {o}",
            "nationality": f"The author of {s} is {o}",
            "residence": f"The author of {s} lives in {o}",
            "codenCode": f"{s} carries the CODEN {o}",
            "issnNumber": f"{s} has ISSN {o}",
            "LCCN_number": f"{s} has LCCN {o}",
            "abbreviation": f"{s} is abbreviated as {o}",
            "academicDiscipline": f"{s} belongs to the discipline of {o}",
            "publisher": f"{s} was published by {o}",
            "firstPublicationYear": f"{s} was first published in {o}",
            "editor": f"{s} was edited by {o}",
            "impactFactor": f"{s} has an impact factor of {o}",
            "oclcNumber": f"{s} has OCLC number {o}",
            "libraryofCongressClassification": f"{s} is classified under {o}",
            "genre": f"{s} is a {o} work",
            "literaryGenre": f"{s} is a {o} work",
            "eissnNumber": f"{s} has e‑ISSN {o}",
            "frequency": f"{s} is issued {o}",
            "headquarter": f"The organization is headquartered in {o}",
            "leader": f"The leader is {o}",
            "birthPlace": f"The author was born in {o}",
            "affiliation": f"{s} is affiliated with {o}",
            "city": f"{s} is located in {o}",
            "president": f"The president is {o}",
            "state": f"{s} is in the state of {o}",
            "spokenIn": f"{o} speaks {s}",
            "influencedBy": f"{s} was influenced by {o}",
            "family": f"{s} belongs to the {o} family",
            "ethnicGroup": f"{s} is associated with the {o} ethnic group",
            "largestCity": f"The largest city is {o}",
            "location": f"{s} is located in {o}",
            "deathPlace": f"The author died in {o}",
            "notableWork": f"Notable work includes {o}",
            "parentCompany": f"{s} is owned by {o}",
            "regionServed": f"{s} serves the region of {o}",
            "founder": f"{s} was founded by {o}",
            "capital": f"The capital is {o}",
            "demonym": f"The demonym is {o}",
            "leaderTitle": f"The leader holds the title of {o}",
            "nickname": f"{s} is nicknamed {o}",
            "genus": f"{s} belongs to the genus {o}",
            "releaseDate": f"{s} was released on {o}",
            "birthDate": f"The author was born on {o}",
        }
        return patterns.get(p, f"{s} {p} {o}")

    # Build a clause for each triple, preserving order
    all_clauses = [clause(triple) for triple in triples]

    # Join clauses into a fluent sentence
    if len(all_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = all_clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(all_clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + all_clauses[-1] + "."

    # Capitalize first letter
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  # Build clauses, starting with a clause that mentions the main subject
      main_subject = triples[0].subject
      main_clauses = [clause(triple) for triple in triples if triple.subject == main_subject]
  
      # If there are other subjects, add them as additional information
      other_clauses = [clause(triple) for triple in triples if triple.subject != main_subject]
  
      all_clauses = main_clauses + other_clauses
  
      # Join clauses into a fluent sentence
      if len(all_clauses) == 1:
          sentence = all_clauses[0] + "."
      else:
          sentence = ", ".join(all_clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + all_clauses[-1] + "."
